slides.title: The Race Condition 🏎️
slides.content:
## Shared Memory Problems

If two goroutines try to read and write to the *exact same variable* at the exact same split second, bad things happen. Values get overwritten. The app might crash.

This is called a **Race Condition**.

slides.title: The Key to the Room 🗝️
slides.content: To fix this, we use a `sync.Mutex` (Mutual Exclusion). It acts like a key to a room. Only one goroutine can hold the key at a time. The others must wait outside until it's unlocked.
